paper_title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
main_subject: Voyager, an LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent for Minecraft
key_components: Skill library for storing and retrieving complex behaviors
Iterative prompting mechanism that generates executable code for embodied control

technical_approach.action_space: Code instead of low-level motor commands
technical_approach.training_requirements: No model parameter access or gradient-based training/finetuning needed

capabilities: Masters a wide range of skills
Makes new discoveries continually without human intervention
Proposes suitable tasks based on current skill level and world state
Refines skills based on environmental feedback
Commits mastered skills to memory for future reuse
Continually explores the world in a self-driven manner
key_innovation: First LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent
title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
